intro_zh: 今天先手动补一版可见的 Paper Push。后续会把它变成周五固定出现的模块：前半部分是 AI4CAE，后半部分是 Biomedical。
intro_en: Bootstrap paper push edition. This will become a recurring Friday module with AI4CAE first and Biomedical second.
biomedical_sources_checked: arXiv (cs.LG, q-bio, eess, stat.ML relevant biomedical items)

cae_papers.title: Error-Conditioned Neural Solvers
cae_papers.summary_zh: 把 residual field 作为输入的神经求解器，强调 PDE surrogate 在分布外和约束违背场景中的自我修正能力。
cae_papers.summary_en: A neural solver that conditions on residual fields to improve PDE surrogate correction under distribution shift and constraint violations.
cae_papers.why: 理论相关度高，适合放在 AI4CAE 板块前列。

cae_papers.title: A Multi-Fidelity Convolutional Autoencoder-Transfer Learning Framework for Guided-Wave-Based Damage Diagnosis Using Large Simulated and Limited Experimental Datasets
cae_papers.summary_zh: 用仿真数据 + 少量实验数据做迁移学习的结构损伤诊断框架，直接命中 damage / fatigue 方向。
cae_papers.summary_en: A multi-fidelity transfer-learning framework for guided-wave damage diagnosis using simulated and limited experimental data.
cae_papers.why: 应用明确，工程结构损伤价值高。

cae_papers.title: A hybrid IFENN solver for generalizable modeling of phase-field fracture initiation and propagation
cae_papers.summary_zh: 把标准 FEM 与预训练神经网络耦合，用于相场断裂从起裂到扩展的可泛化建模。
cae_papers.summary_en: A hybrid FEM-neural IFENN solver for generalizable phase-field fracture initiation and propagation modeling.
cae_papers.why: 有限元、断裂、损伤都很贴近你的 AI4CAE 范围。

cae_papers.title: Monte Carlo physics-informed neural networks for inverse multiscale heat conduction problems via the phonon Boltzmann transport equation
cae_papers.summary_zh: 针对微纳尺度热传导反问题的 MC-PINN，和 heat-load simulation、热场反演很相关。
cae_papers.summary_en: An MC-PINN framework for inverse multiscale heat-conduction problems governed by the phonon Boltzmann transport equation.
cae_papers.why: 热负载与多尺度热传导是你关心的长期主题。

cae_papers.title: A Neural Surrogate Approach for Simulating Natural Convection Problems
cae_papers.summary_zh: 结合 FEniCSx 与 COMSOL 验证的自然对流 neural surrogate，工具链匹配度很高。
cae_papers.summary_en: A neural surrogate for natural-convection simulation validated with FEniCSx and COMSOL workflows.
cae_papers.why: 明确出现 COMSOL / FEM / 热流耦合，是很好的 AI4CAE 工具链例子。

biomedical_papers.title: DNA Language Models: An Assessment of Pre-Training for Fine-Tuning Tasks
biomedical_papers.summary_zh: 评估 DNA language models 预训练是否真正带来下游 genomics 任务收益，是当前 genomics foundation models 的基础问题。
biomedical_papers.summary_en: A recent assessment of whether heavy pretraining for DNA language models actually pays off on downstream genomics tasks.
biomedical_papers.why: 够新，而且直接对应 genetics / genomics AI。

biomedical_papers.title: Site4Drug: Predicting Drug-Binding Target Sites with an AI Agent
biomedical_papers.summary_zh: 面向药物靶点位点发现的 AI agent，强调 modality-aware 的位点排序、风险提示和可追踪决策日志。
biomedical_papers.summary_en: An AI agent for predicting actionable drug-binding target sites with traceable decision logs and modality-aware evidence.
biomedical_papers.why: 既是 biomedical，又和 agent 工作流高度相关。

biomedical_papers.title: scPilot: Large Language Model Reasoning Toward Automated Single-Cell Analysis and Discovery
biomedical_papers.summary_zh: 把 LLM reasoning 直接接到 single-cell RNA-seq 分析和生信工具上，适合作为 omics-native AI 的代表作。
biomedical_papers.summary_en: An omics-native LLM framework that reasons over single-cell RNA-seq data and bioinformatics tools for auditable analysis.
biomedical_papers.why: 非常适合放进 Biomedical 板块，区别于泛医疗影像新闻。

biomedical_papers.title: TxAgent: An AI Agent for Therapeutic Reasoning Across a Universe of Tools
biomedical_papers.summary_zh: 面向治疗推理的 biomedical AI agent，整合多步推理、药物知识、临床约束和工具调用。
biomedical_papers.summary_en: A biomedical AI agent for therapeutic reasoning across a large universe of clinical and drug-related tools.
biomedical_papers.why: 能代表 clinical decision support + agentic biomedical AI 的路线。

biomedical_papers.title: Foundation Model in Biomedicine
biomedical_papers.summary_zh: 对 biomedical foundation models 的综述，覆盖 medical imaging、clinical informatics、drug discovery、computational biology。
biomedical_papers.summary_en: A broad survey of biomedical foundation models across clinical informatics, medical imaging, computational biology, and drug discovery.
biomedical_papers.why: 作为 Biomedical 板块的总览型入口很合适，也能帮后续扩源。
